meta.protocol: blind pairwise, order-swap x2, agreement-gated; faithfulness vs fetched source

per_query.b1_uncertainty: Star count and push date are live, point-in-time reads that will drift. pushed_at proves recent activity but not responsiveness; issue backlog not inspected for staleness. Both quantitative facts triangulated across two primary GitHub readings (HTML + API), so confidence is high for the snapshot.

The question's phrasing 'previously co-founded which organization' implies a prior org distinct from the Claude-maker; the sources show no such org — the only org Amodei co-founded is Anthropic itself (2021). If the quiz key expects 'OpenAI', that is factually incorrect: he was an employee/VP there, not a founder. Founding year 2021 is consistent across sources but was directly confirmed from one primary source (Wikipedia) plus a search-summary corroboration.

Star counts are point-in-time (2026-07) and rise over time; exact figures will drift, but Qdrant's ~3x lead over LanceDB makes the Rust-primary ranking robust. HQ verified via GmbH registration (Berlin seat) plus one aggregator; specific street address (Chausseestraße 86) is single-sourced but the city-level HQ is well corroborated.
